description: 核心 CLI 命令描述符 — --help 顶层命令列表

replacements.description: \"Initialize local config a: description: "初始化本地配置和代理工作区"
replacements.description: \"Interactive onboarding fo: description: "交互式引导配置网关、工作区和技能"
replacements.description: \"Interactive configuration: description: "交互式配置凭证、渠道、网关和代理默认设置"
replacements.description:\n \"Non-interactive co:
description:
      "非交互式配置工具（get/set/unset/file/validate）。默认：启动引导式设置。"
replacements.description: \"Create and verify local b: description: "创建和验证 OpenClaw 状态的本地备份归档"
replacements.description: \"Health checks + quick fix: description: "网关和渠道的健康检查与快速修复"
replacements.description: \"Open the Control UI with: description: "使用当前令牌打开控制面板"
replacements.description: \"Reset local config/state: description: "重置本地配置/状态（保留 CLI）"
replacements.description: \"Uninstall the gateway ser: description: "卸载网关服务和本地数据（保留 CLI）"
replacements.description: \"Search and reindex memory: description: "搜索和重建记忆文件索引"
replacements.description: \"Run one agent turn via th: description: "通过网关运行一次代理"
replacements.description: \"Manage isolated agents (w: description: "管理隔离的代理（工作区、认证、路由）"
replacements.description: \"Show channel health and r: description: "显示渠道健康状态和最近会话接收者"
replacements.description: \"Fetch health from the run: description: "从运行中的网关获取健康状态"
replacements.description: \"List stored conversation: description: "列出已存储的对话会话"
replacements.description: \"Manage OpenClaw's dedicat: description: "管理 OpenClaw 专用浏览器（Chrome/Chromium）"
